Ensure entity-name columns exist on an SPR data frame

Source: R/fetch_school_environment.R
ensure_name_columns.Rd

A few of the earliest SPR sheets (notably the SY2016-17 SchoolDay sheet) ship only the CDS-code id columns and omit the county/district/school name columns. This helper adds any missing name column as NA_character_ so downstream column selection is stable. The CDS-code ids remain the real join keys; a missing name is left NA, never fabricated.

Usage

ensure_name_columns(df)

Arguments

df

A data frame from fetch_spr_data.

Value

df with county_name, district_name, and school_name guaranteed present.
